_comment: Project guardrail notes. Codex CLI runtime defaults live in .codex/aisdlc.json and user config lives under CODEX_HOME.
projectNotes: This repo stores portable AISDLC assets for Deals; application commands run from the Corpay monorepo.
Discover React/TypeScript and .NET/C# commands from the monorepo before running build, test, lint, or run actions.
Use the legacy Deals application as the behavioral guide for the new Deals microfrontend.
